homepage.text_excerpt: David Smith MP | Honoured to represent North Northumberland Skip to content Search for: Search Search Join my Newsletter Join my Newsletter Casework & Support Home About Me My Work Surgeries News Contact Search for: Search Search Serving the people of North Northumberland It’s an honour to serve North Northumberland as your Labour MP. Keep up to date with my work here. My Roles Upcoming Surgeries Latest News My Podcast Financial support Representing North Northumberland My Work in Parliament It’s vital that I’m sharing your issues and concerns in Parliament. You can find all my speeches in the House of Commons here. Parliamentary Work Here to Help You Surgeries I want to be as accessible to constituents as possible. I hold regular general surgeries across the constituency, and my team hold weekly caseworker surgeries in my offices. You can get in touch below. Find out More Standing Against Persecution UK Special Envoy for Freedom of Religion or Belief It’s an honour to represent North Northumberland globally as the Government’s Special Envoy for Freedom of Religion or Belief. Nobody should be persecuted for what they believe. Read more below. FoRB Role A Brief Introduction David Smith MP I’m honoured to be your Labour MP. North Northumberland is a beautiful constituency with common sense British values of respect, hard work, and fair play. Those are my values too, and I’m determined to be an active voice for you in Parliament. I grew up in a family for whom the Labour movement was transformational. I was shaped by the positive legacy of my grandparents’ Labour activism in their own community, and I’m deeply grateful for the opportunity to add to that legacy. Before entering Parliament, I worked in the charity sector for twenty years. Most recently I led a homelessness charity in the North East where the principles of fairness, justice, compassion and empowering the vulnerable were central to everything we did. These principles continue to guide me as your MP. I promise to work with you locally and represent you in Parliament so that together we can make sure North Northumberland gets its fair share. About Me My Work The past year as your MP: in Numbers Local Surgeries around North Northumberland + Meetings & Visits with Local Organisations to Champion Our Area + Constituent Cases dealt with by Me and My Team Keep up to date My Latest News Find the latest news from across North Northumberland, in parliament, and how I’m representing you. What’s not working in the Rural Economy? 20 April, 2026 News The Labour Rural Research Group has opened a new investigation into the rural economy. Putting North Northumberland on the map. Serving the length & breadth of North Northumberland. My two offices are here to support you and champion the wonderful place in which we live. Please get in touch to book an appointment. You can also contact me in Westminster. pages.title: About Me | David Smith MP
pages.meta_description: I was delighted to be elected to serve as the new Member of Parliament for North Northumberland on 4th July 2024. It is the greatest...
headings: h2: Freedom of Religion or Belief
pages.text_excerpt: About Me | David Smith MP Skip to content Search for: Search Search Join my Newsletter Join my Newsletter Casework & Support Home About Me My Work Surgeries News Contact Home About Me Search for: Search Search Home About Me David Smith | MP for North Northumberland About Me I was delighted to be elected to serve as the new Member of Parliament for North Northumberland on 4th July 2024. It is the greatest honour of my life to have been elected as your MP. We’re all rightly proud of the beauty, heritage and community spirit that we have in Northumberland. It’s now time to ensure that North Northumberland has a future that shines as brightly as our past. My experience prior to entering Parliament was in the Charity Sector, in which I’d worked for the last 20 years. In the last 7 years I led a homelessness charity in the North East, through which fairness, justice, compassion and empowering the vulnerable was at the heart of everything, and these qualities continue to guide me to this day in Parliament. I promise to work with you and to bring all of my experience to the job to help and support you, and champion our beautiful region. My Roles Alongside representing you in North Northumberland, I am honoured to participate in a number of Parliamentary and Governmental functions to support constituents, and the wider UK. Find out more about this work below. In Parliament I champion North Northumberland in Parliament, representing the interests of our beautiful area as much as possible when the house is in session. My Work in Parliament Freedom of Religion or Belief Freedom of Religion or Belief Working within the Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office, it is a privilege to be able to champion Freedom of Religion or Belief across the UK and the globe. Member Northern Ireland Affairs Committee My first job was as a peace and reconciliation leader in post-Troubles Northern Ireland. I remain deeply committed to a flourishing Northern Ireland and take my work on Parliament’s Northern Ireland committee very seriously. Find out More Vice Chair APPG for Ending Homelessness I led a homelessness charity in the North East before entering parliament, so I’m proud to be a member of the All-Party Parliamentary Group for Ending Homelessness. It is a continuing priority for me to end homelessness in the UK. Find out More Vice Chair APPG for North Korea I support Britain’s international leadership in freedom and human rights. We cannot ignore the terrible acts of the Kim regime, and Britain has a role to play in challenging North Korea . Find out More Home About Me My Work Surgeries News Contact Join my Newsletter Join my Newsletter Casework & Support Here to Help. pages.meta_description: My team run regular surgeries to support you with practical problems. This could be a dodgy bill, a neighbourhood issue...
pages.text_excerpt: Surgeries | David Smith MP Skip to content Search for: Search Search Join my Newsletter Join my Newsletter Casework & Support Home About Me My Work Surgeries News Contact Search for: Search Search Surgeries I hold regular surgeries around North Northumberland. These include weekly caseworker surgeries with my team, and regular general surgeries with myself. Find out more or book an appointment below. Upcoming Surgeries General Surgeries MPs regularly hold general surgeries for constituents to come and talk about local matters, national policy, or another subject they would like to discuss with their MP. I really enjoy my general surgeries, which I regularly hold across North Northumberland on Fridays. I also hold some online . These surgeries book up fast, and often months in advance. If you’d like to attend one, please email me directly with what you’d like to discuss and where you’d like to meet me. My team will try to find you an appropriate appointment. MP Surgeries Casework & Casework Surgeries For support with practical matters. 10:00 – 13:00 Morpeth Office: first and third Wednesday of the month Berwick Office: second and fourth Wednesday of the month My team also run regular surgeries at my offices to support you with practical problems . This could be a dodgy bill, a neighbourhood issue, a funding need, or anything else. You can book an appointment by following the event links below or by emailing me directly at david.smith.mp@parliament.uk. Make sure to include your issue/problem, contact information, preferred date, time and location. Please do not attend without an appointment. Caseworker Surgery No event found! pages.title: Contact | David Smith MP
pages.text_excerpt: Contact | David Smith MP Skip to content Search for: Search Search Join my Newsletter Join my Newsletter Casework & Support Home About Me My Work Surgeries News Contact Search for: Search Search Contact Me My team and I are here to help you. Please don’t hesitate to get in touch. Contact Details Email david.smith.mp @parliament.uk Email is the best way to get in touch for general queries. If you have a practical problem I’ll respond as soon as possible. Otherwise you can expect a reply in 28 days. Phone 01670 704 099 My team will answer calls from 09:00 – 17:00 Monday to Friday if they’re in the office. Otherwise please leave a voicemail and they’ll get back to you within 24 hours. Letter House of Commons Westminster, London SW1A 0AA I really appreciate reading letters from constituents, especially on more complex and emotive issues. Schools and groups are also welcome to send me letters – I will try my best to reply to them all! Visits Meeting constituents is one of the privileges of my job. I always enjoy opportunities to visit local organisations or host conversations in my office. Please email me at david.smith.mp@parliament.uk if you’d like to arrange a visit or a surgery appointment. You can also find out more about my upcoming casework surgeries below. Alternatively I can organise online calls (on Microsoft Teams) if this is better for you. I also host some surgeries online. For security reasons you must have an appointment to visit me in my office. No event found! My Offices. Our beautiful constituency is the third largest in England, so I’ve secured the funding for two local offices – one in Berwick, and one in Morpeth. You can see their addresses and locations here.
